commands.cmd: wmic logicaldisk where caption='C:' get size,freespace

commands.desc: System File Checker — repair system files
Robust file copy with all attributes
Latency and packet loss per hop

commands.cmd: netsh wlan show profile name="SSID" key=clear
netsh interface ip set address "Ethernet" static 192.168.1.100 255.255.255.0 192.168.1.1
netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off
netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state on

commands.desc: Shutdown and restart apps on next boot

commands.cmd: sc query type= service state= all
sc failure Spooler reset= 86400 actions= restart/5000
sc queryex type= service | find "not running"

commands.desc: Boot to WinRE on next restart

commands.cmd: wmic path Win32_NetworkAdapter where NetEnabled=True get Name,Speed,AdapterType
netsh trace start persistent=yes capture=yes tracefile=network.etl
netsh wlan set hostednetwork mode=allow ssid=MyWiFi key=password
netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Open 8080" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8080
netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name="Open 8080"
netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=8080 connectaddress=192.168.1.100 connectport=80
netsh interface portproxy delete v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=8080
netsh http add urlacl url=http://+:8080/ user=Everyone
wmic path Win32_Printer where default=true get name
wmic printer where name='PrinterName' set default=true
net stop Spooler && net start Spooler
if not exist folder\ md folder

commands.desc: New cmd, run command, stay open
New cmd, run command, stay open

commands.cmd: wmic path Win32_PnPEntity where configmanagererrorcode != 0 get name
powershell Get-NetIPAddress | Sort InterfaceIndex | FT InterfaceAlias,IPAddress,AddressFamily
net stop Audiosrv && net start Audiosrv
netsh http add urlacl url=http://+:8080/ user=Everyone
netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=all verbose
netsh advfirewall firewall set rule group="remote desktop" new enable=Yes
wmic path Win32_NetworkAdapterConfiguration where IPEnabled=True get *

commands.desc: Windows Firewall with Advanced Security GUI
